news.title:
IRCON's bank facilities credit ratings reaffirmed by Infomerics Valuation as IVR AAA (Stable).
Long-term facilities increased to Rs. 1000.03 crore; short-term decreased to Rs. 8,549.97 crore.
news.summary:
IRCON's bank facilities credit ratings reaffirmed by Infomerics Valuation as IVR AAA (Stable).
Long-term facilities increased to Rs. 1000.03 crore; short-term decreased to Rs. 8,549.97 crore.

news.title:
SC stays IRCON's ₹79 crore VAT demand for FY 2010-17, excluding FY 2011-12, pending petitions.
IRCON's Q3 net profit rose 16% YoY to ₹99.9 crore; revenue fell 18.9% to ₹2,119 crore.
news.summary:
SC stays IRCON's ₹79 crore VAT demand for FY 2010-17, excluding FY 2011-12, pending petitions.
IRCON's Q3 net profit rose 16% YoY to ₹99.9 crore; revenue fell 18.9% to ₹2,119 crore.

news.title:
IRCON gets SC relief; ₹78.64 crore VAT demand on hold pending review.
SC reviews Patna HC verdict on Ganga Bridge project involving IRCON.
news.summary:
IRCON gets SC relief; ₹78.64 crore VAT demand on hold pending review.
SC reviews Patna HC verdict on Ganga Bridge project involving IRCON.

news.title:
Patna HC upheld Rs.78.6 cr VAT demand on IRCON for FY10-17, excluding FY11-12.
SC stayed HC judgment on 16-Mar-2026; tax payment temporarily halted.
news.summary:
Patna HC upheld Rs.78.6 cr VAT demand on IRCON for FY10-17, excluding FY11-12.
SC stayed HC judgment on 16-Mar-2026; tax payment temporarily halted.

news.title:
IRCON clarifies no merger discussions with RVNL despite media reports.
Company confirms no undisclosed info affecting share price or trading volume.
news.summary:
IRCON clarifies no merger discussions with RVNL despite media reports.
Company confirms no undisclosed info affecting share price or trading volume.

news.title: IRCON International denies merger talks with RVNL as share prices rise.
news.summary: IRCON International denies merger talks with RVNL as share prices rise.

news.title:
Patna High Court ruled against IRCON's VAT challenge for 2010-17, with Rs.108.75 cr demand.
IRCON paid Rs.27.4 cr; Rs.81.4 cr plus interest remains contested as company reviews judgment.
news.summary:
Patna High Court ruled against IRCON's VAT challenge for 2010-17, with Rs.108.75 cr demand.
IRCON paid Rs.27.4 cr; Rs.81.4 cr plus interest remains contested as company reviews judgment.

news.title:
Court rejects IRCON International's appeal, favoring tax authority's requests.
This decision may lead to significant financial implications for the company.
news.summary:
Court rejects IRCON International's appeal, favoring tax authority's requests.
This decision may lead to significant financial implications for the company.

news.title:
Univastu India surged 6.9% to Rs 67.41 on receiving a Rs 485.7-cr LoA.
The LoA from IRCON is for Mumbai Metro Line 6, Swami Samarth Nagar to Vikhroli EEH.
news.summary:
Univastu India surged 6.9% to Rs 67.41 on receiving a Rs 485.7-cr LoA.
The LoA from IRCON is for Mumbai Metro Line 6, Swami Samarth Nagar to Vikhroli EEH.

news.title:
Govt plans to raise ₹80,000 Cr via stake sale in 7 railway PSUs, retaining 51% ownership to fund modernization.
Key stocks include IRFC, CONCOR, IRCTC, RVNL, Ircon, RailTel, and RITES; focus on infrastructure upgrades and monetization goals.
news.summary:
Govt plans to raise ₹80,000 Cr via stake sale in 7 railway PSUs, retaining 51% ownership to fund modernization.
Key stocks include IRFC, CONCOR, IRCTC, RVNL, Ircon, RailTel, and RITES; focus on infrastructure upgrades and monetization goals.

news.title:
Ircon International reports a 32.7% drop in net profit and 19.2% decline in revenue YoY.
The company faces cash flow issues and increased leverage, raising concerns over stability.
news.summary:
Ircon International reports a 32.7% drop in net profit and 19.2% decline in revenue YoY.
The company faces cash flow issues and increased leverage, raising concerns over stability.

news.title:
IRCON International released Q3 and 9M FY26 unaudited results presentation.
The report includes financial highlights, key projects, order book, and strategy insights.
news.summary:
IRCON International released Q3 and 9M FY26 unaudited results presentation.
The report includes financial highlights, key projects, order book, and strategy insights.

news.title:
Ircon International's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.6B from ₹1.31B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 7.46% from 5.01% YoY.
news.summary:
Ircon International's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹1.6B from ₹1.31B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improved to 7.46% from 5.01% YoY.

news.title:
IRCON International's Board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025, with detailed results shared on BSE/NSE sites.
An interim dividend of Rs. 1.20 per equity share for FY 2025-26 was approved, with payment set to begin on Feb 25, 2026.
news.summary:
IRCON International's Board approved unaudited financial results for Q3 and nine months ending Dec 2025, with detailed results shared on BSE/NSE sites.
An interim dividend of Rs. 1.20 per equity share for FY 2025-26 was approved, with payment set to begin on Feb 25, 2026.

news.title:
IRCON's board to meet on 11th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY26 results.
Board may declare an interim dividend; trading window closed until 13th Feb 2026.
news.summary:
IRCON's board to meet on 11th Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY26 results.
Board may declare an interim dividend; trading window closed until 13th Feb 2026.

news.title:
IRCON International Ltd announced the superannuation of Shri Anand Kumar Singh from the post of Director (Projects) effective 31st December 2025.
The cessation follows SEBI LODR Regulation 30 and Railway Board order dated 7th July 2023.
news.summary:
IRCON International Ltd announced the superannuation of Shri Anand Kumar Singh from the post of Director (Projects) effective 31st December 2025.
The cessation follows SEBI LODR Regulation 30 and Railway Board order dated 7th July 2023.

news.title:
IRCON clarified no price-impacting information is pending after a volume spike query.
The company reassured investors about transparency and no updates influencing trading volumes.
news.summary:
IRCON clarified no price-impacting information is pending after a volume spike query.
The company reassured investors about transparency and no updates influencing trading volumes.

news.title: IRCON, IRFC, RVNL, and other railway stocks rose up to 12% for the third day.
news.summary: IRCON, IRFC, RVNL, and other railway stocks rose up to 12% for the third day.

news.title:
DCM Shriram surged 133.7x in volume to 55.4L shares, gaining 8.7% to Rs.1,312. Ircon rose 6.4x to 93.7L shares, up 4.2% at Rs.156.
RailTel's volume increased 3.6x to 23.2L shares, gaining 5.5% to Rs.336. Dixon's volume rose 3.4x to 10.8L shares, up 3.7% at Rs.12,811.
news.summary:
DCM Shriram surged 133.7x in volume to 55.4L shares, gaining 8.7% to Rs.1,312. Ircon rose 6.4x to 93.7L shares, up 4.2% at Rs.156.
RailTel's volume increased 3.6x to 23.2L shares, gaining 5.5% to Rs.336. Dixon's volume rose 3.4x to 10.8L shares, up 3.7% at Rs.12,811.

news.title:
NSE and BSE fined IRCON International Rs.9.77L each for non-compliance in Board composition for Q3 2025.
IRCON clarified appointments depend on MoR, identified fine as contingent liability; compliance may lead to fine waiver.
news.summary:
NSE and BSE fined IRCON International Rs.9.77L each for non-compliance in Board composition for Q3 2025.
IRCON clarified appointments depend on MoR, identified fine as contingent liability; compliance may lead to fine waiver.
